Metadata.title: Computo e IA del Sur
Metadata.description: Artificial Intelligence solutions, mobile apps, and web systems.

Hero.subtitle: We're a team specialized in Artificial Intelligence, mobile apps, and web systems. We turn ideas into real products.

items.title: AI Solutions
items.description: Process automation, intelligent chatbots, data analysis, and prediction models tailored to your business.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Android and iOS app development with modern technology, an intuitive user experience, and store publishing.

items.title: Web Systems
items.description: Custom web platforms: admin dashboards, business portals, e-commerce, and management systems.

projects.title: Mi Tren Ligero
projects.description: Official companion app for Mexico City's Light Rail Line 1. Real-time schedules, stations, and service reports.

About.title: Who we are
About.paragraph1: We're a team of developers and Artificial Intelligence specialists based in southern Mexico. We believe technology should be accessible to businesses of all sizes.
About.paragraph2: Our goal is to build digital products that create real impact: from mobile apps to AI systems that automate and optimize business processes.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We use cutting-edge technology to solve real problems.

values.title: Commitment
values.description: We support clients from the initial idea all the way to launch.

values.title: Agility
values.description: Fast delivery without sacrificing quality or security.

Contact.subtitle: Tell us your idea and get a tailored proposal back.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your project...
Contact.successBody: We'll be in touch with you soon.
Contact.consent: By submitting, you agree to our <link>privacy policy</link>.

Footer.tagline: Artificial Intelligence, mobile apps, and web systems for businesses that mean business.
